mapper.select:
SELECT COUNT(1) FROM sys_dictionary_item WHERE deleted = 0
AND (dict_type LIKE CONCAT('%', #{keyword}, '%') OR item_code LIKE CONCAT('%', #{keyword}, '%') OR item_name LIKE CONCAT('%', #{keyword}, '%'))
SELECT id, dict_type, item_code, item_name, sort_no, enabled, remark, created_at, updated_at, deleted FROM sys_dictionary_item WHERE id = #{id} AND deleted = 0

SELECT id, dict_type, item_code, item_name, sort_no, enabled, remark, created_at, updated_at, deleted FROM sys_dictionary_item WHERE deleted = 0 AND dict_type = #{dictType} ORDER BY COALESCE(sort_no, 0), id
mapper.insert: INSERT INTO sys_dictionary_item (dict_type, item_code, item_name, sort_no, enabled, remark, created_at, updated_at, deleted) VALUES (#{dictType}, #{itemCode}, #{itemName}, #{sortNo}, #{enabled}, #{remark}, #{createdAt}, #{updatedAt}, #{deleted})
mapper.update:
UPDATE sys_dictionary_item
dict_type = #{dictType}, item_code = #{itemCode}, item_name = #{itemName}, sort_no = #{sortNo}, enabled = #{enabled}, remark = #{remark}, updated_at = #{updatedAt}, deleted = #{deleted},
WHERE id = #{id} AND deleted = 0
